steps.title: Convert the percent increase
steps.content:
A $12.50\%$ increase means the final amount is

$$1+0.125=1.125$$

times the original amount.

steps.title: Work backward from February
steps.content:
Let $n$ be the January $1$ count. Then

$$1.125n=135$$
$$n=\frac{135}{1.125}=120$$

The answer is A.
